title: Varieties of associative algebras with an identity of third degree
author_string: Lyubov A. Vladimirova, Vesselin S. Drensky
abstract: We give a complete description of the varieties of associative algebras over a field of characteristic zero which satisfy a polynomial identity of third degree.
comment: This is an English translation of a paper published in 1983 (see Zbl 0664.16015, MR0866654) and available online at https://www.math.bas.bg/pliska/Pliska-08/Pliska-08-1986-144-157.pdf
